title: Estrogen Tweaks
description: Adds a crafting recipe for Estrogen Patches :3
body:
# Estrogen Tweaks
Estrogen Tweaks is an **unoffical** module for [Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen) that adds a crafting recipe for Estrogen Patches, allowing them to be crafted without [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)!

I created this mod for myself, as I'm not a big fan of [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create/versions), but I've wanted to play with [Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen) for a long while. **This module will be deprecated once there is an offical crafting recipe for patches added to [Estrogen](https://modrinth.com/mod/estrogen).**

## Crafting Recipe
Estrogen Patches can be crafted using Paper, and either a Slime Ball or Honey Bottle.
![A crafting recipe for Estrogen Patches. They can be crafted using one Paper, and either a Honey Bottle or Slime Ball.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WWo51Won/images/3a0980a83a49d66d2e99185a57625ba1916752db.gif)
